method: Legacy E3.11 Transformer/SQI grid before residual denoise pivot
key_result: Acc anchors around 0.9519 with bad recall about 0.9823; preferred balanced run around 0.9505 / bad recall 0.9837
value: Established the first classification guardrails and showed that accuracy alone was insufficient for waveform quality.

method: Predict residual/noise_hat instead of direct clean ECG
key_result: Best residual line reached strong classification, but early visual denoise was still too weak/light.
value: Locked in the residual prediction design: denoise = noisy - scale * noise_hat.

method: Bad/medium SNR separation sweep over med/bad gap families
key_result: Gap 5-7 dB families made denoise visually inspectable while keeping classification feasible.
value: Selected med6.25/badgap7/badcm0.75 as the current mechanism dataset.
recommendation: Use as current E3.11f artifact; do not regenerate for mainline.

method: Morph-aware denoise losses with U-Net denoiser controls
key_result: U-Net residual denoiser produced strong visual denoise and showed mature denoiser representations can classify well.
value: Teacher/oracle evidence for warm denoiser representation, but not acceptable as final mainline because user requires Transformer-based model.

method: Full-joint denoise-before-classifier plus explicit SQI residual/gated heads
key_result: Full Transformer paths reached roughly 0.962-0.973 depending on warm-start and conflict controls; explicit SQI was not stable enough alone.
value: Showed denoise-before-classifier is useful but CE can damage denoise when coupled too tightly.
recommendation: Explicit SQI remains ablation/analysis; mainline uses denoiser-derived SQI representation.

method: PCGrad/cap, distill guard, alternating and bounded loss experiments
key_result: CE-primary PCGrad/cap improved conflict diagnostics, but did not solve the deeper issue that CE backprop can corrupt denoiser features.
value: Justified the detach design: classify from denoiser representation without letting CE rewrite the denoiser.
recommendation: Keep gradient surgery as analysis, not current mainline.

method: Warm denoiser encoder-head audit: freeze/detach/scratch/probe ablations
key_result: Warm denoiser latent was dramatically stronger than scratch and residual-summary-only controls.
value: Proved that the useful signal is not just residual energy; it is structured denoiser representation.
recommendation: Mechanism retained; U-Net latent treated as oracle.

method: Transformer classifier re-entry with U-Net teacher/latent FiLM/token/cross adapters
key_result: Best Transformer-path adapter: film SQI classifier-He seed0 acc 0.98093, bad recall 0.99455, denoise_score 2.819; pure Transformer controls around 0.944-0.946.
value: Showed real Transformer logits can recover part of the oracle advantage, but denoise still depended on U-Net teacher.

method: 1D TransUNet/Uformer/Conformer denoiser pretrain then detached SQI head
key_result: Uformer hierarchy reached acc 0.98955, bad recall 0.99728, denoise_score 4.303, SNR gain 12.406 in audit.
value: Brought Transformer back into the denoiser itself while retaining U-shaped local fidelity.
recommendation: Promote Uformer variant into clean mainline.

method: Mechanism ablations around Uformer full-token detached representation
key_result: Chosen a_repr_detach_full_tokens: acc 0.99001, good/medium/bad 0.98501/0.98910/0.99591, denoise_score 4.282. Highest backup c_repr: acc 0.99046. CE-backprop control kept acc but denoise collapsed to -3.12.
value: Explains why each mechanism is necessary: full tokens, Transformer blocks, U-shaped skips, local conv stem, and CE detach.
recommendation: Use a_repr_detach_full_tokens as thesis/mainline core; keep c_repr as backup and controls as proof.

method: Clean src/transformer_pipeline Uformer mainline rerun: Stage1 denoiser pretrain then Stage2 detached full-token SQI head
key_result: Test acc 0.98819, good/medium/bad 0.98910/0.97956/0.99591, denoise_score 4.293, SNR gain 12.386, MSE ratio 0.0445.
value: Confirms the promoted clean code reproduces the mechanism with full split 10935/2184/2202 and full visualization export.
recommendation: Treat as current clean mainline run; continue seed confirmation before final paper table.
